name: parallax
description: Real-time 3D video meetings with WebRTC, Anaglyph, and Gaussian Splatting

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:gpu"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=client && npm run lint --workspace=server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=client && npm run test --workspace=server
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules client/node_modules server/node_modules client/dist server/dist
